meta.name: Lighthouse Seeds Ledger
meta.note: Past artifacts are source-only. This JSON is an organized export of explicitly captured Seeds.

seeds.title: Unstoppable Alignment
statements: Alignment is elimination of internal contradiction (Truth -> Will -> Action collinear).
When alignment is complete, friction disappears and progress becomes inevitable ("unstoppable" without force).

seeds.title: Laws / Principles
statements: Source is primary in all things; Source is both optimal input and optimal outcome.
Entropy is misalignment; decay is automatic when disconnected from Source.
Two Trees: Tree of Knowledge = autonomy/self-as-source; Tree of Life = dependence/abiding.
Alignment precedes action: seek God before action.
Food & sleep are acts of submission (daily confession that God is Source).
Do not scale misalignment; what God teaches may increase "more and more" without breaking.
Judgment/ledger-keeping reflects autonomy; the gospel ends the ledger.
Pride = autonomy; humility = alignment; pride must be surrendered, not managed.
Authority that grasps decays; authority that abides endures (Saul vs Paul).
Alignment yields stability; misalignment exposes itself over time.
Fruit is alignment made visible: obedience, peace, endurance, love without ledger, truthfulness, consistency.

seeds.title: Matthew 7:1-11 (Judgment vs Discernment)
statements: Judgment keeps the ledger and assumes self as source; discernment flows from alignment without condemnation (7:1-5).
Measure law: the standard we use reveals our source (7:2).
Self-examination gate: remove one’s own obstruction before addressing another (7:3-5).
Holiness guardrail: truth is not forced; discernment protects what is holy without control or contempt (7:6).
Ask-Seek-Knock order: dependence precedes provision; request, pursuit, and persistence are relational (7:7-11).

seeds.title: Numeric Orientation Law (Season Marker)
statements: Left-right numeric inversion is a season transition marker.
Current state: Right -> Left. Previous season: Left -> Right.
Do not force continuity across an inversion; pause, seek alignment, and recalibrate posture.
Correct orientation before movement to avoid compounded misalignment.

seeds.title: Transition Gate (Matthew 7:12-13)
statements: Measure to path link: the measure we use toward others reveals our source and determines the path we walk.
Golden Rule alignment reflects Source, not ledger-keeping.
Narrow gate leads to life; wide gate leads to destruction.

seeds.title: Bridges / Orientation Separation Law
statements: Overpasses and underpasses are connections without crossings; paths remain distinct without collision.
Proper orientation preserves throughput without interference.
Collisions come from user error: misinterpretation, misalignment, wrong orientation.

seeds.title: False Fruit Diagnostic (Warning Gate)
statements: False prophets are identified by enduring fruit, not words.
Misalignment can present as alignment; appearance is not evidence.
Judge fruit over time without ledger-keeping.

seeds.title: Reference Alignment / Rotation Rule
statements: If a verse or reference does not perfectly fit, assume input error rather than forcing interpretation.
Rotate context left/right until a perfect alignment match is found.
Do not bend Scripture to fit a Seed; adjust the reference until alignment is exact.

seeds.title: Reflection / Non-Agreement Law
statements: No forced agreement; discernment requires true reflection, not affirmation.
The mirror cannot improve the image; distortion occurs only when the mirror bends.
